# Jidoka

> Built-in quality for agent instructions — eight layers, each with one job,
> and checks that stop the line the moment a layer drifts.

Jidoka is an open-source standard for keeping humans and coding agents on one
layered instruction architecture. The name is the Toyota principle of building
quality into the process itself, so the line stops at the first defect and
never passes one downstream. Instructions span eight layers, ascending from
most general (the system prompt, every run) to most specific (a checklist at
one pause point). Each layer owns a single job, no layer restates another, and
every layer has a machine-checkable budget — so a defect always traces to
exactly one of them, and the checks halt before it ships.

It draws on three well-publicized ideas. Jidoka (Toyota) answers how quality
holds: it is built into the process, not inspected in afterward. Jobs To Be
Done (Christensen, Moesta) answers what agents align to: the progress each
persona seeks, not a feature list. The Checklist Manifesto (Gawande) answers
how alignment holds under load: structured instructions keep existing
knowledge consistently applied.

The lowest layer, verification, uses two checklist gates. Each is wrapped in
a semantic tag — `<read_do_checklist>` for entry gates, `<do_confirm_checklist>`
for exit gates — so every pause point in a repository is discoverable from
anywhere with one `rg` search.

Jidoka stands on its own: any well-structured repository can adopt it,
whatever its directory shape. It defines the universal root files every
adopting repository carries — CLAUDE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and JTBD.md — along
with the Jobs To Be Done conventions. A repository's structure standard extends
it; the Monorepo standard is one such extension, and the Kata Agent Team
implements it as a daily loop.

Install via `apm install forwardimpact/jidoka-skills`, then ask Claude to set
it up. Wire the installed `jidoka` binary (or `npx @forwardimpact/jidoka`)
into your checks to stop the line at the first drifted layer.

## Optional

- [The full standard (JIDOKA.md)](https://github.com/forwardimpact/monorepo/blob/main/JIDOKA.md)
- [Monorepo structure standard](https://www.monorepo.team/)
- [Kata Agent Team](https://www.kata.team/)
